plan.past_runat: ⏱ The scheduled time has already passed ({time}). Choose whether to send now or change the time.
plan.expired: ⏰ The approval window has expired. Please create it again.

module.disabled: Module '{{name}}' is disabled. Please enable it in system settings and try again.
module.input_validation_failed_catalog: [{{name}}] Input validation failed: {{detail}} — do not guess values. Find the right action with search_module_actions(query), then call get_action_schema("{{name}}", action) for exact params before invoking.
module.input_validation_failed: [{{name}}] Input validation failed: {{detail}} — do not guess values; call get_module_config("{{name}}") to see valid actions/params.
module.input_validation_failed_scoped: [{{scope}}/{{name}}] Input validation failed: {{detail}} — do not guess values; call get_module_config("{{name}}") to see valid actions/params.
module.packages_missing: [{{module}}] Required package '{{package}}' is not installed. Click [Install] in the Settings system tab.
module.ws_only_unsupported: '{{action}}' of module '{{name}}' needs a persistent WebSocket connection (realtime) and is not supported yet. Please use the snapshot query action instead.
module.ws_not_wired: No WebSocket transport is wired for module '{{name}}'.

page.permission_denied: You do not have permission to access this page.
page.slug_same: Slug is identical to the existing one.

hub.path_denied: You do not have permission to access this path. You can only work within your own workspace folder.

project.name_same: Project name is identical to the existing one.
project.name_invalid_chars: Project name cannot contain slashes or whitespace.

media.data_url_invalid: dataUrl is not a valid data URL.
media.data_url_no_comma: dataUrl does not contain a comma.
media.image_mime_only: Only image MIME types are allowed: {{type}}
media.unsupported_image_format: Unsupported image format (only JPEG / PNG / WebP / GIF).
media.image_processor_missing: image_processor not configured — cannot create placeholder.
media.image_gen_missing: image_gen not configured — cannot generate image.

auth.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.password_policy_category: Password must include at least 3 of: uppercase, lowercase, number, special character.
auth.password_same_as_id: Password cannot be the same as the ID.

consolidation.hook_unset: ConsolidationAiHook not configured — call set_ai_hook with AiManager + ConversationManager to enable LLM auto-extraction.
consolidation.hook_unset_short: ConsolidationAiHook not configured — call set_ai_hook to activate.

task.llm_transform_unimplemented: LLM_TRANSFORM not implemented (Phase B-16+) — activates after AiManager is configured.

schedule.trigger_required: schedule: one of cronTime / runAt / delaySec must be specified.

ai.turn_exhausted: The tool-call budget ({{max}} calls) was exhausted before the task finished. Please split the request into smaller steps or try again.
ai.empty_final: Response generation failed (the model returned no content). Please try again.
ai.tool_dispatcher_unready: Activates after ToolDispatcher full wiring — AiManager.resolve_call_target API exposure required.

telegram.ai_manager_unset: AiManager + ModuleManager not configured — activates after with_ai_and_module.

rpc.rename_unimplemented: rename — in progress with Phase B-9.

llm.api_key_required: Please enter the {{name}} API key (Settings → AI tab or API keys tab).

install.in_progress: Installing {{package}} — approx {{estimatedSec}}s. Please retry after completion.

auth.lock_body:
5 consecutive failed sign-ins. IP: {{ip}}. Locked for 60s.
If this wasn't you, change your password.

setup.title: Firebat Initial Setup
setup.subtitle: Configure administrator account, language, and timezone
setup.password_hint: 8+ characters with at least 3 of: uppercase, lowercase, number, special character. Cannot match the ID.
setup.err_password_policy: Password must be 8+ characters and include at least 3 of: uppercase, lowercase, number, special character.
setup.err_password_same_as_id: Password cannot be the same as the ID.
setup.err_failed: An error occurred. Please try again.

admin_chat.no_model_error: ⚙ Open Settings → AI tab, configure an API key or CLI authentication, then select a model.
admin_chat.fallback_empty_reply: No response received. Please try again.
admin_chat.fallback_timeout: Server didn't respond in 2 minutes. Possibly SSE disconnect — please retry.

settings.interface_lang_desc: Language for the admin interface. Independent from the public site language (set in CMS settings).
settings.admin_credentials_desc: Current password is required. Leave fields blank to keep existing values.
settings.admin_credentials_warning: ⚠ Changing the password invalidates all existing login sessions. API tokens used by external tools (MCP / API) are NOT automatically revoked — for stronger security, regenerate them in the MCP tab.

page.not_found_message: The page you requested does not exist or has moved.
page.error_message: An error occurred while processing your request. Please try again in a moment.

common.no_settings: No settings available for this module.
common.og_size_hint: 1200×630px · Refresh after saving to reflect changes
common.verifications_content_placeholder: File content (e.g. ads.txt standard line, Google site-verification meta, etc.)
common.token_warning: This token cannot be viewed again. Copy it now.
common.token_none: No token. Generate one to use SSE (API) connections.
common.token_revoke_message: Revoking the token will immediately block the associated connection. Continue?
common.token_regenerate_message: The existing token will be invalidated. Generate a new token?
common.mcp_sse_hint_llm: Add the configuration below to the tools array of the OpenAI Responses API (Claude API uses the same URL).
common.mcp_sse_hint_app: Add the JSON below to your MCP settings in VS Code / Cursor / Claude Desktop (header auth).
common.mcp_web_connector_desc: Claude.ai's web connector form has no header field, so the token must ride in the URL. Paste the URL below into the 'Remote MCP server URL' field and leave the OAuth fields empty.
common.mcp_web_connector_warning: The token is exposed in the URL (it may appear in server logs), so use it only with your own server and regenerate the token above if you suspect a leak.
common.mcp_stdio_hint: Connects directly to the server via SSH.
common.mcp_stdio_ssh_required_body: stdio mode requires an SSH key registered on the server. Ask your server administrator to register your SSH public key.
common.mcp_stdio_ssh_required_note: Replace SSH_KEY_PATH, USER, SERVER_IP, and the firebat path with actual values.

chat_input.plan_mode_always_tooltip: Plan ALWAYS — show plan card for every request (click → OFF)
chat_input.plan_mode_auto_tooltip: Plan AUTO — plan only for destructive/complex tasks (click → ALWAYS)
chat_input.plan_mode_off_tooltip: Plan OFF — let AI decide freely (click → AUTO)

settings_modal.preferences_placeholder: Feel free to describe preferred tone, language, domain knowledge, format, etc. (optional)
settings_modal.memory_summary_placeholder: One line: the rule or key point to always apply
settings_modal.memory_body_placeholder: Details, exceptions, context. The AI looks this up via memory_read when needed.
settings_modal.tts_help: The voice engine that generates listening (LC) audio. Built-in browser voices are free; OpenAI and Gemini offer more natural voices (selectable once the matching API key is set).
settings_modal.tts_browser_note: Uses the voice built into the browser/device. It is free and works offline, but voice quality and accent vary by device, and playback may be limited in some in-app browsers (e.g. KakaoTalk).
settings_modal.tts_default_voice_help: The default voice for a single speaker (monologue/narration). Dialogue voices are assigned automatically by the AI based on each speaker's gender. Tap the speaker icon next to a name to preview.
settings_modal.tts_align_help: How the transcript is synced to the audio (karaoke progress, click-to-seek). Auto = local signal analysis for WAV (free, accurate sentence sync), otherwise OpenAI (Whisper). Local = signal analysis only (no API, no cost, deterministic). OpenAI = precise word-level sync via Whisper (key required).
settings_modal.timezone_help: Applied to cron scheduling and AI time references
settings_modal.admin_account_change_hint: Current password required. Leave blank to keep existing values.
settings_modal.admin_account_change_warning: ⚠ Changing the password invalidates all existing sessions. API tokens already in use by external tools (MCP / API) are not revoked automatically, so we recommend rotating tokens on the MCP tab to strengthen security.
settings_modal.admin_pw_either_required: Enter either a new username or a new password.
settings_modal.exec_mode_help: API: pay-per-token using each provider's key · CLI: use Claude Pro/Max, ChatGPT Plus, etc. subscription accounts directly (monthly)
settings_modal.mode_help: General mode: direct API per provider · Vertex mode: GCP Vertex AI (Service Account auth)
settings_modal.cli_provider_help: Anthropic Claude Code / OpenAI Codex / Google Gemini CLI — authenticated via subscription account
settings_modal.prompt_caching_help: Reusing the same prefix (system/tools) within 5 minutes cuts cost by 90% and speeds up responses. For single-shot calls, a 25% cache-write surcharge applies. ON is recommended for multi-turn conversations; OFF for short single-shot calls.
settings_modal.subagent_help: Delegate large jobs (multi-symbol backtests, several analyses) to sub-agents and run them in parallel to cut time by 1/N. Each sub-agent adds an LLM call, so API mode multiplies cost by N and CLI mode puts more load on quotas/memory. Default is OFF.
settings_modal.cli_subscription_gemini: Google AI Pro subscription (or free tier)
settings_modal.cli_guide_install_step: Install the CLI and sign in from the server terminal (browser-based OAuth)
settings_modal.cli_guide_verify: After signing in, verify with the "Check status" button above
settings_modal.cli_guide_subscription: Subscription based — runs without an API key via {{subscription}}
settings_modal.cli_guide_tos: Personal use only. Using as a backend for other users' service risks a violation.
settings_modal.vertex_sa_label: Google Vertex AI service account JSON
settings_modal.vertex_sa_help: GCP Console → IAM → Service Accounts → Create key (paste the entire JSON)
settings_modal.ai_assistant_desc: Toggle ON = after each reply, auto-extracts Recall facts + lessons via consolidation (using the selected model). OFF = manual saves only ("remember this"). Recall/history/Memory injection (read) runs regardless of the toggle.
settings_modal.ai_assistant_role_recall: Recall + history auto-inject (always, toggle-independent) — on every user query, runs an integrated E5 search over history + entities/facts/events (Recall) and prepends it to the system prompt
settings_modal.ai_assistant_role_consolidation: Auto extraction (consolidation, toggle ON only) — at conversation end / 6h cron, auto-extracts entities/facts/events (Recall) + lessons (Memory) and stores them with E5 embeddings
settings_modal.ai_assistant_role_tool_select: Tool selection — Gemini (API) only. GPT/Claude (API) and CLIs handle this through their own MCP
settings_modal.ai_assistant_role_component_select: Component selection — invoked on search_components calls (shared across all User AIs)
settings_modal.ai_assistant_role_history_rewrite: History query rewriting — resolves pronouns and references on search_history calls
settings_modal.ai_assistant_role_history_rerank: History result re-ranking — picks the semantic top-K from the vector top-N
settings_modal.ai_assistant_cli_note: CLI mode: only the last 10 turns are bundled into the prompt, so when long conversations (over 10 turns) or cross-conversation references are needed, AI Assistant improves search_history call quality.
settings_modal.ai_assistant_cache_note: Results are cached, so LLM calls decrease over time.
settings_modal.ai_assistant_no_key_warning: ⚠️ Register the API key for the selected model's provider first (one of OpenAI / Gemini (Google AI Studio) / Vertex / Anthropic).
settings_modal.user_prompt_help: Appended after the User AI (admin chat) system prompt. When left empty, nothing is injected and the model's native response is used. Not applied to Code Assistant or AI Assistant.
settings_modal.image_model_help: The model the AI uses when invoking the image_gen tool. The result is saved to the server, an /api/media URL is returned, and it can be reused in render_image or blog posts.
settings_modal.image_exec_mode_help: API: pay-per-image with the provider's API key · CLI: Codex/Gemini CLI subscription (monthly)
settings_modal.image_default_help: User commands take precedence. This value is the fallback when unspecified.
settings_modal.image_no_models: No image models registered. Add a JSON file under infra/image/configs/.
settings_modal.image_org_verify_link_suffix: and verify the organization once (up to 15 minutes to reflect).
settings_modal.image_subscription_note: 💳 Subscription based — no API key required. The {{bin}} CLI must be installed and signed in on the server.
settings_modal.secrets_llm_note: LLM provider keys (OpenAI / Google / Anthropic / Vertex) are managed on the AI tab.
settings_modal.secrets_module_keys_hint: Keys detected automatically from each module's config.json.
settings_modal.mcp_oauth_waiting: Complete sign-in in the Google window and it will be processed automatically
settings_modal.mcp_oauth_popup_closed: The sign-in window was closed. Please try again.
settings_modal.mcp_add_hint: Tools from registered MCP servers are automatically detected by the AI and available for calls.
settings_modal.mcp_connect_failed_message:
Registration was cancelled because the connection failed.

{{error}}
settings_modal.capability_list_hint: Manages the execution priority of modules that provide the same capability.
settings_modal.capability_exec_order_hint: Runs in order from the top
settings_modal.memory_empty_line1: No memories stored yet. The AI saves them automatically when it discovers user rules or preferences.
settings_modal.memory_empty_line2: Or add one directly with the "New memory" button.
settings_modal.memory_intro: User rules, preferences, and domain context the AI saves on its own. The index is auto-prepended to the system prompt for every conversation.
settings_modal.memory_description_label: The line the AI always sees (put rules here)
settings_modal.memory_content_label: Detailed body (looked up by the AI when needed)
settings_modal.cost_budget_explainer: USD limit = API mode (pay-per-token). Call-count limit = all modes (including CLI subscription).
settings_modal.cost_budget_alert_label: Alert threshold (%) — when the progress bar darkens
settings_modal.cost_budget_usage_note: Current usage: today ${{dailyUsd}} / {{dailyCalls}} calls · this month ${{monthlyUsd}} / {{monthlyCalls}} calls
settings_modal.cost_summary_intro: Last {{days}}d LLM call totals. CLI subscription models report cost=0 (tokens only).
settings_modal.cost_empty_message: No LLM call records in the last {{days}} days
